resources.string: FlexKnee AI needs access to your camera to track your knee movement and measure your range of motion accurately.
Video is processed locally on your device. No video footage is ever recorded or uploaded to the cloud.
Place your phone on the floor or a low table, leaning against a wall, about 5-6 feet away from you.
Ensure the room is well-lit. Avoid standing directly in front of a bright window (backlighting).
Stand sideways to the camera so your knee joint is clearly visible during the exercise.
